meta.title: Cruises | We Love Adventure Travels
meta.description: Plan your perfect cruise with Victoria Smith — ocean, river, family, and luxury cruises. Get personalized recommendations and exclusive deals.

pageHero.title: CRUISES
pageHero.description: Ocean, river, family, and luxury cruises — Victoria finds the right ship, the right itinerary, and the right price for exactly the trip you're dreaming of.

section1.heading: Ocean & Caribbean Cruises
paragraphs: The Caribbean is one of the most popular cruise regions in the world — and for good reason. Seven-night itineraries from ports in Florida and Texas hit multiple islands, give you time in the water, and feel like a completely different world.

Victoria works with all the major cruise lines — Carnival, Royal Caribbean, Norwegian, Celebrity, MSC, and more. She knows which ships are worth the upgrade and which excursions are actually worth booking before you board.
Whether it's your first cruise or your fifteenth, she'll match you with the right ship, the right cabin, and an itinerary that fits your group.

section2.heading: River & Luxury Cruises
paragraphs: River cruises through Europe are an entirely different experience — smaller ships, port-intensive itineraries, and a pace that actually lets you absorb the places you visit. The Danube, the Rhine, and the Douro are favorites Victoria has planned for many clients.

For those who want the finest at sea, luxury lines like Viking, Oceania, Azamara, and Regent Seven Seas offer an all-inclusive experience with exceptional service. Victoria knows these products inside and out and can help you decide if the higher price tag makes sense for your trip.

whyUse.heading: Victoria Does the Work. You Do the Fun.

cards.title: No Extra Cost to You
cards.text: Victoria earns her commission from the cruise line — her expertise and service cost you nothing.

cards.title: Exclusive Perks & OBC
cards.text: As a partner agent, Victoria can access onboard credit, upgrades, and amenity packages you won't find booking direct.

cards.title: Advocacy When Things Go Wrong
cards.text: If your flight is delayed or a port stop is cancelled, Victoria is on the phone working it out while you're still on the ship.

ctaBanner.heading: Let Victoria Plan Your Perfect Cruise
ctaBanner.paragraph: Tell her when you want to go, how many in your group, and the kind of experience you're after — she'll do the rest.
